name: import-landed-cost
description: Calculates the landed cost of imported goods including tariffs, freight, insurance, and compliance fees.
long_description: This circuit verifies the calculation of landed cost for imported goods, a critical calculation in international trade. It takes customs values, freight costs, insurance, and quantity, along with tariff information from public datasets, and produces a verifiable proof that the landed cost, duty amount, and compliance fees were correctly calculated according to CBP regulations.

private.name: customs_value
private.description: The declared customs value of the goods in USD cents

public.name: shipping_mode
public.description: Shipping mode: sea, air, rail, or road

public.name: landed_cost
public.description: Total landed cost in USD cents

public.name: duty_amount
public.description: Customs duty amount in USD cents

public.name: mpf_amount
public.description: Merchandise Processing Fee in USD cents

public.name: hmf_amount
public.description: Harbor Maintenance Fee in USD cents

dataset_dependencies.description: US Harmonized Tariff Schedule rates and rules

author: VRL Trade Working Group
security_notes: This circuit assumes honest input values from the importing party. Verification depends on the integrity of CBP tariff dataset. Not recommended for adversarial settings.
performance_notes: Constraint count: 8. Proof generation time: ~100ms. Proof size: ~2KB.
